home.title: Find Your Perfect Match
home.subtitle: Discover your MBTI personality type and connect with compatible people who understand you.
home.step1Desc: Answer 15 thoughtful questions about your preferences, habits, and how you see the world.
home.step2Desc: Receive your detailed MBTI personality type with in-depth insights into your strengths.
home.step3Desc: Discover compatible personalities, connect through real-time chat, and build meaningful relationships.
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of users who have found their perfect personality match.

quiz.title: MBTI Personality Test
quiz.pleaseAnswerAll: Please answer all questions before submitting.
quiz.instruction2: Choose the option that feels most natural to you
quiz.instruction3: There are no right or wrong answers
quiz.question1: You often spend time reflecting on your thoughts and feelings.
quiz.question2: You enjoy being the center of attention at social gatherings.
quiz.question3: You make decisions based on logic rather than emotions.
quiz.question4: You prefer to have a detailed plan before starting a task.
quiz.question5: You find it easy to empathize with others' feelings.
quiz.question6: You often act on impulse without thinking too much.
quiz.question7: You enjoy creative activities like art, music, or writing.
quiz.question8: You prefer working in a team rather than alone.
quiz.question9: You focus on the big picture rather than small details.
quiz.question10: You value harmony and avoid conflicts whenever possible.
quiz.question11: You trust your intuition more than concrete facts.
quiz.question12: You feel energized after spending time with a group of people.
quiz.question13: You prefer practical solutions over theoretical concepts.
quiz.question14: You often worry about things going wrong.
quiz.question15: You are comfortable making quick decisions under pressure.

result.title: Your Personality Type
result.description: Based on your answers, here is your personality type and its characteristics.
result.takeQuizFirst: Take the quiz first to discover your personality type.
result.discoverType: Discover your type by taking the quiz!

funnyTypeDescs.INTJ: The only people who can spend 6 hours planning a grocery list and still forget the milk.
funnyTypeDescs.INTP: Will research why they are hungry for 3 hours and end up reading about quantum physics.
funnyTypeDescs.ENTJ: Tries to optimize their sleep schedule like a corporate merger.
funnyTypeDescs.ENTP: Will argue both sides of any topic just to see what happens.
funnyTypeDescs.INFJ: Can tell you are having a bad day just by your text message punctuation.
funnyTypeDescs.INFP: Has written at least 47 unfinished poems about coffee.
funnyTypeDescs.ENFJ: Remembers everyone birthdays, plans every group hangout, and somehow still gets asked what they do for work.
funnyTypeDescs.ENFP: Starts 15 hobbies in one weekend and perfects zero of them.
funnyTypeDescs.ISTJ: Has a color-coded calendar for their color-coded calendar.
funnyTypeDescs.ISFJ: Will remember your coffee order from 3 years ago and make it for you without asking.
funnyTypeDescs.ESFJ: Will organize your birthday, your dinner party, and your life advice session all in one Saturday.
funnyTypeDescs.ESTJ: Approaches a vacation like a military operation.
funnyTypeDescs.ISTP: Will fix your car, your computer, and your life advice in under 10 minutes with minimal words.
funnyTypeDescs.ISFP: Expresses love through carefully curated Spotify playlists and random flower pickups.
funnyTypeDescs.ESFP: Cannot sit through a movie without providing commentary.
funnyTypeDescs.ESTP: Will skydive on a Monday, start a business on Tuesday, and question their life choices on Wednesday.

INTJ.title: The Architect
INTJ.desc: Strategic, analytical, and independent thinkers who see the big picture and plan for the future.

INTP.title: The Logician
INTP.desc: Innovative, curious, and logical problem-solvers who love exploring abstract ideas.

ENTJ.title: The Commander
ENTJ.desc: Bold, strategic, and natural leaders who organize people to get things done.

ENTP.title: The Debater
ENTP.desc: Inventive, clever, and love intellectual challenges and debating ideas.

INFJ.title: The Advocate
INFJ.desc: Insightful, principled, and passionate about helping others reach their potential.

INFP.title: The Mediator
INFP.desc: Poetic, kind, and altruistic dreamers who seek meaning and authentic connections.

ENFJ.title: The Protagonist
ENFJ.desc: Charismatic, inspiring leaders who motivate others to grow and achieve.

ENFP.title: The Campaigner
ENFP.desc: Enthusiastic, creative, and sociable free spirits who find possibilities everywhere.

ISTJ.title: The Logistician
ISTJ.desc: Responsible, thorough, and dependable organizers who value tradition and loyalty.

ISFJ.title: The Defender
ISFJ.desc: Dedicated, warm, and protective caregivers who are always ready to help.

ESFJ.title: The Consul
ESFJ.desc: Caring, sociable, and helpful community builders who thrive on harmony.

ESTJ.title: The Executive
ESTJ.desc: Excellent administrators, organized and loyal who excel at managing projects.

ISTP.title: The Virtuoso
ISTP.desc: Bold, practical, and masters of tools who love understanding how things work.

ISFP.title: The Adventurer
ISFP.desc: Flexible, artistic, and always ready to explore new experiences with sensitivity.

ESFP.title: The Entertainer
ESFP.desc: Spontaneous, energetic, and life of the party who love bringing joy to others.

ESTP.title: The Entrepreneur
ESTP.desc: Smart, energetic, and very perceptive individuals who live on the edge.

footer.description: Discover your personality type and connect with compatible people through the power of MBTI psychology.
footer.aboutText: MBTI Match uses the Myers-Briggs Type Indicator to help you understand yourself better and find meaningful connections with compatible personalities.

legal.footerNote: By using MBTI Match, you acknowledge that you have read and understand these legal documents.
legal.termsAcceptanceBody: By accessing and using MBTI Match, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use this service.
legal.termsServiceBody: MBTI Match provides personality type assessment based on the Myers-Briggs Type Indicator framework. Our service includes quiz assessments, personality matching, and real-time chat features. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any aspect of the service at any time.
legal.termsAccountsBody: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account. You must provide accurate and complete information during registration. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
legal.termsContentBody: You agree not to post content that is abusive, offensive, threatening, or otherwise inappropriate. Our safety filter system automatically monitors content in both English and Persian languages. Violations may result in account suspension.
legal.termsPrivacyBody: Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
legal.termsContactBody: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our application or via email at support@mbtimatch.com.
legal.privacyCollectBody: We collect information you provide directly, including phone number, full name, city, profile photo, and location data. We also collect quiz responses to determine your personality type and match you with compatible users.
legal.privacyUseBody: Your information is used to provide personality matching, facilitate communication between matches, improve our service, and ensure platform safety. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
legal.privacySharingBody: Your profile information is shared only with your matched partners. Location data is used solely for proximity-based matching and is never shared with third parties. Chat messages are encrypted in transit.
legal.privacySecurityBody: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption, secure authentication, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
legal.privacyRightsBody: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also request a copy of all data we hold about you. To exercise these rights, please contact our support team.
legal.cookiesWhatBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a better user experience by remembering your preferences, language settings, and authentication state.
legal.cookiesUseBody: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management, analytics cookies to understand how users interact with our service, and preference cookies to remember your language and regional settings.
legal.cookiesManagingBody: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our service. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are required for the service to work.
legal.cookiesChangesBody: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting a notice on our website or through the application.
